title: Tappytoon Wins Webby People's Voice Award
content: Contents First announced on Wednesday that its global webtoon platform Tappytoon has won the Webby People's Voice Award in the Entertainment, Sports & Events category (Apps, Software & Immersive) at the 30th Annual Webby Awards.
author: ANN

title: 5th Girls und Panzer das Finale Film Streams Teaser Video
content: Bandai Namco Filmworks began streaming on Friday a teaser video for the fifth film in the six-part Girls und Panzer das Finale film series The Girls und Panzer television anime premiered in October 2012 and had 12 episodes. The Girls und Panzer der Film anime film followup opened in Japan in November 2015.
author: ANN

title: The Player Who Can't Level Up Webtoon's Game Adaptation Debuts Playable Demo on Steam
content: The video game adaptation of the hit webtoon The Player Who Can't Level Up released its first playable demo on Steam on Thursday. Tripearl Games is developing and Smilegate is publishing the 3D action roguelite game.
author: ANN

title: Emaqi Releases Izakaya of Extinct Animals, The Gene of AI, More Manga in English
content: AI localization company Orange Inc. announced on Friday that it will release the following manga titles in English on its e-bookstore service " emaqi " on the following dates: emaqi also stated it released volume 2 of Nobuyuki Takahashi 's Parallel Leap Syndrome manga and volume 10 of Kenichi Okuyama's The Morning…
author: ANN

title: Carnby Kim, Youngchan Hwang Return With New Thriller Webtoon Copycat
content: Acclaimed thriller creators Carnby Kim and Youngchan Hwang have made their return to WEBTOON with a new series titled COPYCAT , which debuted on April 14 in English. The series debuted in Korean on January 6. Known for hit titles such as Bastard and Sweet Home , the duo have built a reputation for crafting thrillers.
author: ANN

title: FuRyu's Exstetra RPG Gets HD Remaster on Steam in English This Summer
content: FuRyu revealed on Friday its Exstetra fantasy role-playing game is getting an HD remaster that will launch this summer on Steam . The game's Steam page lists the game will have interface and subtitles in English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese. The game will also have Japanese audio.
author: ANN

title: Rokuhōdō Yotsuiro Biyori Manga Gets Stage Musical in October
content: Shinchosha announced on Friday that Yū Shimizu 's Rokuhōdō Yotsuiro Biyori manga is inspiring its first stage musical adaptation that will run in Shibuya in Tokyo from October 16-25. Shimizu drew the below visual to commemorate the announcement.
author: ANN

title: Sound Euphonium Final Movie Part 2 Reveals Trailer and Key Visual, September 2026 Release
content: Part 2 of Sound Euphonium: The Final Movie has been officially set for a September 11, 2026 theatrical release in Japan, revealing a visual and trailer. Part 1 released on April 24.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Sound! Euphonium, The Final Movie Part 2' Anime Opens on September 11
content: Kyoto Animation began streaming on Friday a trailer for Sound! Euphonium , The Final Movie Part 2 ( Saishū Gakushō Hibike! Euphonium Kōhen ), the second and final part in the Sound! Euphonium , The Final Movie project . The below trailer reveals the film will open in Japan on September 11.
author: ANN

title: Kuroema Live-Action Series Reveals More Cast
content: The staff of the live-action mini-series adaptation of Tsunami Umino 's Kuroema Chole et Emma manga revealed more cast members for the series on Friday. The series stars, including previously revealed cast members: (left to right in above image in top row then bottom row): • Hana Sugisaki as Emma • Mikako Tabe as…
author: ANN
